purpose: Mixes and dispenses powder additives with controlled accuracy, subject to buildup and dispensing degradation

states.name: mixer_buildup
states.description: Powder residue buildup in mixer components

events.name: mixer_blockage
events.description: Mixer blocked or damaged by foreign objects

events.name: incompatible_grinder_configuration
events.description: Powder unit incompatible with 4 grinders option

parameters.name: buildup_rate
parameters.description: Rate of powder buildup accumulation per unit density

parameters.name: dispensing_degradation_time
parameters.description: Time constant for dispensing accuracy degradation

parameters.name: mixer_blockage_threshold
parameters.description: Buildup level at which mixer blockage occurs

parameters.name: accuracy_warning_threshold
parameters.description: Dispensing accuracy level triggering compatibility warning

state_transition_logic: mixer_buildup increases by buildup_rate * powder_density * dt, clamped to [0.0, 100.0]
dispensing_accuracy decreases by (dispensing_accuracy / dispensing_degradation_time) * powder_density * dt, clamped to [0.0, 100.0]
assumptions: Powder buildup accumulates proportionally to powder density
Dispensing accuracy degrades exponentially with powder density as driver
Mixer blockage is primarily caused by excessive buildup
Grinder compatibility issues manifest as reduced dispensing accuracy
